title: Trump Takes On the Fed, US-Intel Deal, Why Bankruptcies Are Up, OpenAI's Longevity Breakthrough
description:
(0:00) Bestie intros: The Moose is loose at J-Cal Ranch!

(0:46) All-In Summit updates, Jason's new program

(9:45) Trump vs the Federal Reserve: Is the Fed partisan, what should a modern Fed look like?

(36:45) US-Intel Deal: Sustainability, China comparison, could deals like this save Social Security?

(51:37) US Sovereign Wealth Fund

(58:41) Why corporate bankruptcies are trending up in 2025

(1:12:12) OpenAI's novel LLM-based approach to longevity research
